title: Jumbo 6.5 inch XL Carabiner Key Chain  - Blue
description:
These carabiners are the best way to keep things handy while camping, hiking, running, or adventuring! Attach one to your backpack, water bottle, keys or purse to keep things handy and organized. The carabiners are constructed of durable aluminum and come with a key ring for easy attachment to just about anything. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep around the house, your office or outdoor gear. Please note: these carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING.
